title: Probed constants moved out of layerblocks

features.name: ref_cast of constant inside layerblock driving output probe
features.description: Code should include a ref.cast operation applied to a constant inside a layerblock, where the layer-scoped reference drives an output probe via ref.define

features.name: dont_touch_annotation preserving node inside layerblock
features.description: Code should include a DontTouchAnnotation on a node inside a layerblock containing a constant, which prevents the canonicalizer from hoisting the constant and removing the ref.cast context
